name: Exxon Mobil
description: Exxon Mobil is an integrated energy producer with upstream, downstream, and chemicals operations tied to hydrocarbon demand and supply conditions.

technology.summary: This fixture treats Exxon as an energy operating business rather than a standalone technology platform.
technology.world_impact: Energy availability remains economically important, but the technology lens is secondary here.
technology.preferred_rationale: Technology is not the primary investment lens here.

stock.commentary: Cash generation is strong relative to valuation, but the thesis remains cyclical and commodity-sensitive.
